name: K6 Dev Container
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y tig && curl -fsSL https://github.com/grafana/k6/releases/download/v1.6.1/k6-v1.6.1-linux-amd64.tar.gz | sudo tar -xz --strip-components=1 -C /usr/local/bin k6-v1.6.1-linux-amd64/k6 && curl -fsSL https://github.com/derailed/k9s/releases/latest/download/k9s_Linux_amd64.tar.gz | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin k9s && curl -fsSL https://github.com/grafana/xk6/releases/download/v1.3.4/xk6_1.3.4_linux_amd64.tar.gz | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin xk6
